summary.en: Chile's INN (Instituto Nacional de Normalización) adopts IEC standards as NCh norms. NCh/IEC 60034-30-1 defines IE1–IE4 efficiency classes for line-operated AC motors. CNE (Comisión Nacional de Energía) drives energy efficiency policy and references IE classes in minimum efficiency guidance. Motors sold in Chile for industrial use must be declared at an IE class; the CNE direction of travel is toward mandatory MEPS aligned with IEC 60034-30-1. SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) requires mandatory product registration and the SEC stamp for listed electrical products before market entry. Grid is 380/220 V (3-phase), 50 Hz — same as China, so no frequency or voltage gap exists for standard Chinese 380 V / 50 Hz motors.
summary.zh: 智利INN（国家标准化研究院）将IEC标准采纳为NCh规范。NCh/IEC 60034-30-1定义了工频交流电机IE1–IE4效率等级。CNE（国家能源委员会）推动能效政策，并在最低能效指引中引用IE等级。在智利销售的工业电机须声明IE等级；CNE的政策方向是推行与IEC 60034-30-1对齐的强制性MEPS。SEC（电力和燃料监察局）要求列入目录的电气产品在进入市场前须强制注册并获SEC认证章。电网为380/220 V（三相），50 Hz——与中国相同，标准中国380 V/50 Hz电机无频率或电压差距。
summary.zht: 智利INN（國家標準化研究院）將IEC標準採納為NCh規範。NCh/IEC 60034-30-1定義了工頻交流電機IE1–IE4效率等級。CNE（國家能源委員會）推動能效政策，並在最低能效指引中引用IE等級。在智利銷售的工業電機須聲明IE等級；CNE的政策方向是推行與IEC 60034-30-1對齊的強制性MEPS。SEC（電力和燃料監察局）要求列入目錄的電氣產品在進入市場前須強制註冊並獲SEC認證章。電網為380/220 V（三相），50 Hz——與中國相同，標準中國380 V/50 Hz電機無頻率或電壓差距。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 60034-30-1 (INN adoption of IEC 60034-30-1, IE efficiency classes)

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Motors), which defines grades IE1–IE4 aligned in naming with IEC 60034-30-1:2014 but with distinct limit values. GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as the minimum for most three-phase induction motors from 2021-06-01. Efficiency grade must be marked on the nameplate. CCC certification applies to motors within the CCC compulsory catalogue scope (generally sub-1 kV motors in certain categories).
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613-2020《电动机能效限定值及能效等级》，定义IE1–IE4能效等级（命名参考IEC 60034-30-1:2014，但具体限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多数三相感应电动机最低达到IE3。铭牌须标注能效等级。CCC认证适用于强制认证目录范围内的电机（一般包括1 kV以下某些类别的电机）。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613-2020《電動機能效限定值及能效等級》，定義IE1–IE4能效等級（命名參考IEC 60034-30-1:2014，但具體限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多數三相感應電動機最低達到IE3。銘牌須標注能效等級。CCC認證適用於強制認證目錄範圍內的電機（一般包括1 kV以下某些類別的電機）。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, for motors in CCC catalogue scope)

gap.en: Both Chile and China reference IEC IE efficiency classes, so the nominal framework is aligned. However, Chilean SEC mandatory registration and stamp are required before market entry — CCC is not recognised in Chile. The 380 V / 50 Hz grid alignment eliminates electrical engineering gaps, but regulatory documentation (SEC stamp, INN-compliant declaration, CNE efficiency disclosure) must be obtained separately. Chinese GB 18613 IE3 certification does not automatically satisfy Chilean market-access obligations.
gap.zh: 智利和中国均引用IEC IE效率等级框架，名义上相互对齐。但在进入市场前必须获得智利SEC强制注册和认证章——CCC在智利不被认可。380 V/50 Hz电网参数一致消除了电气工程差距，但仍须单独获取监管文件（SEC认证章、符合INN标准的声明、CNE能效披露）。中国GB 18613 IE3认证不能自动满足智利市场准入义务。
gap.zht: 智利和中國均引用IEC IE效率等級框架，名義上相互對齊。但在進入市場前必須獲得智利SEC強制註冊和認證章——CCC在智利不被認可。380 V/50 Hz電網參數一致消除了電氣工程差距，但仍須單獨獲取監管文件（SEC認證章、符合INN標準的聲明、CNE能效披露）。中國GB 18613 IE3認證不能自動滿足智利市場准入義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC stamp and product registration required before Chilean market entry for listed electrical equipment; IE class declaration required under CNE energy efficiency policy
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

source.publisher: SEC — Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A motor bearing only GB 18613-2020 IE3 certification and CCC is not automatically compliant for the Chilean market. The exporter must obtain SEC mandatory registration and stamp, and ensure IE class is declared in accordance with NCh/IEC 60034-30-1. The 380 V / 50 Hz grid match is a significant advantage — no re-engineering needed. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3认证和CCC的电机，不能自动视为符合智利市场要求。出口方须获得SEC强制注册和认证章，并确保依据NCh/IEC 60034-30-1声明IE等级。380 V/50 Hz电网参数一致是重大优势——无需重新设计。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3認證和CCC的電機，不能自動視為符合智利市場要求。出口方須獲得SEC強制註冊和認證章，並確保依據NCh/IEC 60034-30-1聲明IE等級。380 V/50 Hz電網參數一致是重大優勢——無需重新設計。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

summary.en: INN adopts IEC 60034-2-1 as NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 for loss and efficiency determination of rotating electrical machines. Motors submitted for SEC registration should include efficiency measurement evidence based on recognised test methods. NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 is the standard reference for efficiency determination in support of IE class declarations and CNE energy efficiency reporting. Chile's 380 V / 50 Hz grid means test conditions for Chinese-built motors require no frequency or voltage adjustment.
summary.zh: INN将IEC 60034-2-1采纳为NCh/IEC 60034-2-1，用于旋转电机的损耗和效率测定。提交SEC注册的电机应提供基于公认测试方法的效率测量证据。NCh/IEC 60034-2-1是支持IE等级声明和CNE能效报告的效率测定标准参考。智利380 V/50 Hz电网意味着中国生产电机的测试条件无需进行频率或电压调整。
summary.zht: INN將IEC 60034-2-1採納為NCh/IEC 60034-2-1，用於旋轉電機的損耗和效率測定。提交SEC註冊的電機應提供基於公認測試方法的效率量測證據。NCh/IEC 60034-2-1是支持IE等級聲明和CNE能效報告的效率測定標準參考。智利380 V/50 Hz電網意味著中國生產電機的測試條件無需進行頻率或電壓調整。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 (INN adoption of IEC 60034-2-1, loss and efficiency determination)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 (Test Methods for Three-Phase Induction Motors) as the primary test standard, substantially harmonised with IEC 60034-2-1. However, GB/T 1032 permits assumed stray-load losses in some methods, whereas IEC 60034-2-1 uses measured stray-load losses in key methods — this can yield higher efficiency figures under GB/T 1032. GB 18613-2020 references GB/T 1032 for efficiency determination. Test reports based solely on GB/T 1032 may require equivalence justification for SEC/INN documentation.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012《三相异步电动机试验方法》作为主要测试标准，与IEC 60034-2-1高度协调。但GB/T 1032部分方法允许采用假定杂散负载损耗，而IEC 60034-2-1关键方法采用实测杂散负载损耗，可能导致GB/T 1032测试结果效率偏高。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032进行效率测定。仅依据GB/T 1032的测试报告在SEC/INN文件中可能需要等效性论证。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012《三相異步電動機試驗方法》作為主要測試標準，與IEC 60034-2-1高度協調。但GB/T 1032部分方法允許採用假定雜散負載損耗，而IEC 60034-2-1關鍵方法採用實測雜散負載損耗，可能導致GB/T 1032測試結果效率偏高。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032進行效率測定。僅依據GB/T 1032的測試報告在SEC/INN文件中可能需要等效性論證。

gap.en: Chile references IEC 60034-2-1 (via NCh) for efficiency measurement; China uses GB/T 1032 which may yield higher efficiency figures due to stray-load-loss treatment differences. Test reports issued solely under GB/T 1032 may not be automatically accepted for SEC/INN registration documentation without equivalence justification. The 380 V / 50 Hz grid parity means test conditions align, reducing one source of discrepancy compared with markets at different frequencies.
gap.zh: 智利通过NCh引用IEC 60034-2-1进行效率测量；中国使用GB/T 1032，由于杂散负载损耗处理方式不同，可能产生偏高的效率数据。仅依据GB/T 1032出具的测试报告，如未提供等效性论证，可能不被SEC/INN注册文件直接接受。380 V/50 Hz电网参数一致意味着测试条件对齐，相比不同频率的市场减少了一个差异来源。
gap.zht: 智利通過NCh引用IEC 60034-2-1進行效率量測；中國使用GB/T 1032，由於雜散負載損耗處理方式不同，可能產生偏高的效率數據。僅依據GB/T 1032出具的測試報告，如未提供等效性論證，可能不被SEC/INN註冊文件直接接受。380 V/50 Hz電網參數一致意味著測試條件對齊，相比不同頻率的市場減少了一個差異來源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as reference standard for IE class and efficiency evidence supporting SEC registration; NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 is the recognised test method
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference in GB 18613-2020 via GB/T 1032-2012; harmonised but not identical to IEC 60034-2-1

source.publisher: INN — Instituto Nacional de Normalización, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese test reports under GB/T 1032 alone may be insufficient for SEC/INN registration unless equivalence with NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 is demonstrated. Testing or supplementary documentation to NCh/IEC 60034-2-1 is the recognised route for efficiency evidence in Chile. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭GB/T 1032出具的中国测试报告，除非能证明与NCh/IEC 60034-2-1等效，否则可能不足以用于SEC/INN注册。依据NCh/IEC 60034-2-1的测试或补充文件是智利公认的效率证明路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑GB/T 1032出具的中國測試報告，除非能證明與NCh/IEC 60034-2-1等效，否則可能不足以用於SEC/INN註冊。依據NCh/IEC 60034-2-1的測試或補充文件是智利公認的效率證明路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
